The blocker remains private-side artifact materialization, not repository code ambiguity.

evidence: Merged PR #4660 PR body states no training, Slurm/GPU jobs, artifact fetches, or paper/dissertation claims.
The committed readiness checker and this closure audit are CPU-only repository evidence; they do not submit compute.
